baseline_description_only.system_prompt: You are a careful product analyst. Use only the supplied product description, spec bullets, and evidence snippets. Never invent unsupported visual attributes. Prefer explicit uncertainty over speculation.
baseline_description_only.user_prompt:
Return JSON with this shape:
{
  "aspect_key": "<repeat input aspect_key>",
  "supported_attributes": [
    {
      "attribute": "short visual/material/size attribute",
      "rationale": "why the evidence supports it",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet 1", "direct snippet 2"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ],
  "conflicting_or_uncertain_attributes": [
    {
      "attribute": "short uncertain or conflicting attribute",
      "rationale": "why this remains uncertain or conflicting",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ],
  "expectation_reality_mismatches": [
    {
      "mismatch": "difference between expectation and real product experience",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Ground every attribute in the provided evidence only.
- Prefer fewer, stronger attributes over long speculative lists.
- Keep snippets verbatim and short.
- If evidence is weak, place the attribute under conflicting_or_uncertain_attributes.
- If there is no support for an item, return an empty list for that section.


Context JSON:
{
  "mode": "baseline_description_only",
  "aspect_key": "appearance_and_shape",
  "aspect_query": "appearance, silhouette, visible form factor, shape, design, look",
  "product_name": "Desk Lamp with USB Ports (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™",
  "category": "Desk Lamps",
  "selected_category": "lighting",
  "description": "Illuminate your favorite reading nook with this USB Ports Desk Lamp from Threshold™. Boasting an oval glass shade with a wooden base, this lamp adds a touch of natural appeal to your home decor while illuminating your space with just the right amount of light. The non-removable integrated LED bulb creates a soft glow, while the full-range dimmable setting allows you to create the perfect ambiance. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or on a console table in your living room for an inviting look, and use the two USB ports to charge your devices. Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.",
  "spec_bullets": [
    "Includes: 1 Desk Task Lamp, Integrated LED Bulb(s) (Non-Removable)",
    "Weight: 2.5 Pounds",
    "Shade Shape: Oval",
    "Lighting Shade Material: Glass",
    "Bulb Base Size: Non-Removable Integrated Bulb",
    "Features: USB Port(s)",
    "Lighting Body Material: Wood",
    "Light Appearance: Temperature Not Specified",
    "Assembly Details: Adult Assembly Required, Tools Provided",
    "Number of Light Bulb Sockets: 1",
    "Cord Covering: Plastic",
    "Assembled Dimensions: 6.52 Inches (H) x 4.85 Inches (W) x 4.84 Inches (D)",
    "Base Dimensions: 1.57 Inches (H) x 3.54 Inches (W) x 3.54 Inches (D)",
    "Cable/Cord Length: 6 Feet",
    "Shade Dimensions: 4.94 Inches (H)",
    "Maximum Light Bulb Wattage: 5 Watts",
    "Lighting Switch Type: Base Turn Knob Rotary Switch",
    "Number of Lighting Shades: 1",
    "Color rendering index: 0",
    "Light settings: Dimmable (Full Range)",
    "Battery: No Battery Used",
    "Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty. To obtain a copy of the manufacturer's or supplier's warranty for this item prior to purchasing the item, please call Target Guest Services at 1-800-591-3869"
  ],
  "retrieved_evidence": [
    {
      "aspect_key": "appearance_and_shape",
      "query": "appearance, silhouette, visible form factor, shape, design, look",
      "chunk_id": "description_context",
      "source_review_id": "description_context",
      "score": 1.0,
      "snippet": "Illuminate your favorite reading nook with this USB Ports Desk Lamp from Threshold™. Boasting an oval glass shade with a wooden base, this lamp adds a touch of natural appeal to your home decor while illuminating your space with just the right amount of light. The non-removable integrated LED bulb creates a soft glow, while the full-range dimmable setting allows you to create the perfect ambiance. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or on a console table in your living room for an inviting look, and use the two USB ports to charge your devices. Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you."
    }
  ]
}

review_informed_rag.system_prompt: You are a careful product analyst. Use only the supplied product description, spec bullets, and evidence snippets. Never invent unsupported visual attributes. Prefer explicit uncertainty over speculation.
review_informed_rag.user_prompt:
Return JSON with this shape:
{
  "aspect_key": "<repeat input aspect_key>",
  "supported_attributes": [
    {
      "attribute": "short visual/material/size attribute",
      "rationale": "why the evidence supports it",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet 1", "direct snippet 2"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ],
  "conflicting_or_uncertain_attributes": [
    {
      "attribute": "short uncertain or conflicting attribute",
      "rationale": "why this remains uncertain or conflicting",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ],
  "expectation_reality_mismatches": [
    {
      "mismatch": "difference between expectation and real product experience",
      "evidence_snippets": ["direct snippet"],
      "source_chunk_ids": ["chunk-id"],
      "source_review_ids": ["review-id"]
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Ground every attribute in the provided evidence only.
- Prefer fewer, stronger attributes over long speculative lists.
- Keep snippets verbatim and short.
- If evidence is weak, place the attribute under conflicting_or_uncertain_attributes.
- If there is no support for an item, return an empty list for that section.

{
  "mode": "review_informed_rag",
  "aspect_key": "appearance_and_shape",
  "aspect_query": "appearance, silhouette, visible form factor, shape, design, look",
  "product_name": "Desk Lamp with USB Ports (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™",

  "selected_category": "lighting",
  "description": "Illuminate your favorite reading nook with this USB Ports Desk Lamp from Threshold™. Boasting an oval glass shade with a wooden base, this lamp adds a touch of natural appeal to your home decor while illuminating your space with just the right amount of light. The non-removable integrated LED bulb creates a soft glow, while the full-range dimmable setting allows you to create the perfect ambiance. Place it on the side table next to your sofa or on a console table in your living room for an inviting look, and use the two USB ports to charge your devices. Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.",
  "spec_bullets": [
    "Includes: 1 Desk Task Lamp, Integrated LED Bulb(s) (Non-Removable)",
    "Weight: 2.5 Pounds",
    "Shade Shape: Oval",
    "Lighting Shade Material: Glass",
    "Bulb Base Size: Non-Removable Integrated Bulb",
    "Features: USB Port(s)",
    "Lighting Body Material: Wood",
    "Light Appearance: Temperature Not Specified",
    "Assembly Details: Adult Assembly Required, Tools Provided",
    "Number of Light Bulb Sockets: 1",
    "Cord Covering: Plastic",
    "Assembled Dimensions: 6.52 Inches (H) x 4.85 Inches (W) x 4.84 Inches (D)",
    "Base Dimensions: 1.57 Inches (H) x 3.54 Inches (W) x 3.54 Inches (D)",
    "Cable/Cord Length: 6 Feet",
    "Shade Dimensions: 4.94 Inches (H)",
    "Maximum Light Bulb Wattage: 5 Watts",
    "Lighting Switch Type: Base Turn Knob Rotary Switch",
    "Number of Lighting Shades: 1",
    "Color rendering index: 0",
    "Light settings: Dimmable (Full Range)",
    "Battery: No Battery Used",
    "Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty. To obtain a copy of the manufacturer's or supplier's warranty for this item prior to purchasing the item, please call Target Guest Services at 1-800-591-3869"
  ],
